race.comment: LATHLAIN (10) looks very well placed here. The fresh win at Seymour was utterly dominant when scoring by 5.5 lengths, outclassed in the G2 Kewney behind Sass Appeal at Flemington last time on a tricky day. She's way back in grade now and will take beating. BOHEMIAN ANGEL (12) is in flying form, a narrow winner over an in form horse two back, just finding one better last time in this grade. She'll be looking to take gaps and charge through. SISTER SHAY (3) wasn't far away in a bunched finish first up at Caulfield in a Vobis race. She'll be fitter now and can roll forward from out wide. CRIPPS (4) is racing in good form, only overrun late at Yarra Valley last time with a big weight. He can give cheek. NEW SOVEREIGN (2) hasn't fired in a while but is good on his day, watch the market.
